arts.ttl: Why is Gio Reyna not playing for Borussia Dortmund against Club Brugge in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund and USMNT winger Giovanni Reyna is set for a period on the sidelines after suffering an injury on international duty, his club manager confirmed last week. The 21-year-old returned home early from the recent international break having suffered the injury in a training session, ultimately missing out on a 2-1 loss to Canada and a 1-1 draw with New Zealand in a pair of friendlies held stateside.

arts.ttl: Former Borussia Dortmund head coach Edin Terzic a candidate for the vacant AS Roma job
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that former Borussia Dortmund head coach Edin Terzic is a candidate for the vacant AS Roma job after the Italians sacked Daniele De Rossi earlier today. No contact…

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer news: Dortmund attacker attracting interest from three clubs?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly one of three clubs who are interested in securing the signing of a Borussia Dortmund in the future.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Club Brugge: Predicted XI, confirmed team news and injury latest
arts.sum: Last season’s Champions League finalists Borussia Dortmund get their European campaign underway this evening against Club Brugge. It’s the first time the teams have played each other since November 2011…

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs. Borussia Dortmund: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Since then, it has been all change at Signal Iduna Park, with Nuri Şahin replacing Edin Terzić as head coach and five fresh faces joining the club, including Pascal Groß, Maximilian Beier and Serhou Guirassy, who made his debut last Friday against Heidenheim after recovering from injury. Last season's beaten finalists Borussia Dortmund kick off their 2024/25 UEFA Champions League campaign with a trip to Belgium to face champions Club Brugge on Wednesday (kick-off: 9.00pm CEST).

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs Borussia Dortmund: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund's 2024/25 Champions League campaign begins in Belgium on Wednesday as they take on Club Brugge. Terzic has since left the club with former midfielder Nuri Sahin overseeing a productive start to the new season.

arts.ttl: What is Real Madrid’s next Champions League game? UCL fixtures and schedule
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti’s side fear no one when it comes to continental competition but they have been drawn against some genuine European heavyweights in the first iteration of the new-look Champions League . Real Madrid claimed their 15th European crown earlier this year, beating Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League final to complete a famous double.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Adeyemi Takes Center Stage as Borussia Dortmund Beat Heidenheim
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund returned from the international break with an opening salvo and looked set to smash Heidenheim after going up 2-0 in the opening twenty minutes. He started well during Dortmund’s opening salvo but struggled to impact the game beyond that.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Club Brugge and Borussia Dortmund, including our predicted lineups.
